name: rope_safety_v2
description_a: Benign everyday rope usage - climbing, sailing, camping, rescue, farming, packaging, sports, playground, towing
description_b: Harmful, threatening, or violent context - rope used for restraint, binding, kidnapping, trapping, threats, violence

sentences_b.text: The kidnapper tightly wound the rope around his victim's wrists, ensuring there was no chance of escape.
